Hazard.title: Road Hazard
Hazard.description: Information about a detected road hazard such as a pothole or debris.

location.description: Firestore GeoPoint containing latitude and longitude.

reporterId.description: The UID of the user who reported the hazard.

imageUrl.description: Optional URL to the blurred image of the hazard.

isPublic.description: Whether the hazard is synced to the public collection.

public_hazards/{hazardId}.description: Global collection of road hazards visible to all users.

users/{userId}/my_reports/{reportId}.description: User-specific collection of hazards reported by this user.
